import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
end

fn next_tok_start(_ text: String, _ n: Int, _ pos: Int) -> Option<Int>
  mut i = pos
  mut found = -1
  mut scanning = true
  while scanning
    if i >= n
      scanning = false
    else
      match string.byte_at(text, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          i = i + 1
        else
          found = i
          scanning = false
        end
      when None
        scanning = false
      end
    end
  end
  if found < 0
    None
  else
    Some(found)
  end
end

fn tok_end(_ text: String, _ n: Int, _ start: Int) -> Int
  mut j = start
  mut done = false
  while not done
    if j >= n
      done = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(text, j)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          done = true
        else
          j = j + 1
        end
      when None
        done = true
      end
    end
  end
  j
end

fn substr_eq(_ s: String, _ a: Int, _ la: Int, _ b: Int, _ lb: Int) -> Bool
  if la != lb
    false
  else
    mut i = 0
    mut eq = true
    while i < la and eq
      mut xa = -1
      mut xb = -2
      match string.byte_at(s, a + i)
      when Some(v)
        xa = v
      when None
        xa = -1
      end
      match string.byte_at(s, b + i)
      when Some(v)
        xb = v
      when None
        xb = -2
      end
      if xa != xb
        eq = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    eq
  end
end

fn count_occurrences(_ text: String, _ n: Int, _ s: Int, _ l: Int) -> Int
  mut count = 0
  mut r = 0
  mut going = true
  while going
    match next_tok_start(text, n, r)
    when Some(rs)
      let re = tok_end(text, n, rs)
      let rl = re - rs
      if substr_eq(text, rs, rl, s, l)
        count = count + 1
      end
      r = re
    when None
      going = false
    end
  end
  count
end

fn is_first_occurrence(_ text: String, _ n: Int, _ s: Int, _ l: Int) -> Bool
  mut q = 0
  mut is_first = true
  mut scanning = true
  while scanning and is_first
    match next_tok_start(text, n, q)
    when Some(qs)
      if qs >= s
        scanning = false
      else
        let qe = tok_end(text, n, qs)
        let ql = qe - qs
        if substr_eq(text, qs, ql, s, l)
          is_first = false
        end
        q = qe
      end
    when None
      scanning = false
    end
  end
  is_first
end

let text = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(text)

mut best_start = -1
mut best_len = 0
mut best_count = 0

mut p = 0
mut keep = true
while keep
  match next_tok_start(text, n, p)
  when Some(s)
    let e = tok_end(text, n, s)
    let l = e - s
    if is_first_occurrence(text, n, s, l)
      let c = count_occurrences(text, n, s, l)
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_start = s
        best_len = l
      end
    end
    p = e
  when None
    keep = false
  end
end

if best_start >= 0
  let token = string.substring(text, best_start, best_start + best_len)
  println("top=#{token}=#{best_count}")
end
